accessibility_reports.claim_level: automated smoke gate, not WCAG certification

checks.title: Heading and landmark structure
checks.detail: The shell keeps a single page heading plus header, nav, main, and footer landmarks for screen-reader navigation.

checks.title: Main navigation and skip link
checks.detail: Skip link receives focus first and shows visible focus styling.

checks.title: Inclusive Classroom toolbar
checks.detail: Large text, high contrast, plain language, reduce motion, and keyboard modes are toggleable and persisted locally.

checks.title: Role switch and teacher controls
checks.detail: Teacher mode exposes upload controls without showing a separate admin shell.

checks.title: Upload flow and redirect focus
checks.detail: Teacher upload keeps the interaction in-page, restores focus to the status region, and updates the shared class collection.

checks.title: Inclusive form preferences
checks.detail: Plain-language mode feeds grounded QA, and the visible progress contract names the Gemma 4 answering stage.

checks.title: QA flow and saved-answer focus
checks.detail: Grounded QA lands on a saved URL and returns focus to the status region.

checks.title: Citation jump flow
checks.detail: Keyboard activation jumps to the evidence card, focuses it, and keeps it clear of the page header.

checks.title: Disclosure open/close focus
checks.detail: The detail disclosure toggles open and closed without losing keyboard focus.

checks.title: Read-aloud transcript
checks.detail: Generated answer audio is optional; the same content remains available as text.

checks.title: Source inspection flow
checks.detail: The cited source view opens with the cited excerpt visible first.

checks.title: Code tutor flow
checks.detail: Code tutor saves to a stable URL and keeps disclosure focus stable after opening evidence.

checks.title: Admin system view
checks.detail: Admin mode exposes runtime, retrieval, indexing, OCR, and queue diagnostics in one server-rendered page.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Inclusive Classroom Mode
manual_validation_checklist.detail: Large text, high contrast, plain language, reduce motion, and keyboard mode toggles are exercised.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Read-aloud transcript
manual_validation_checklist.detail: Answer read-aloud controls are paired with visible transcript text.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Keyboard-only upload
manual_validation_checklist.detail: Teacher role switch, file input, submit button, redirect, and status-region focus are exercised.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Keyboard-only QA
manual_validation_checklist.detail: Question entry, submit activation, saved URL, and status-region focus are exercised.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Keyboard-only citation/source navigation
manual_validation_checklist.detail: Citation jump focus and source inspection popup are exercised.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Keyboard-only code tutor
manual_validation_checklist.detail: Textarea entry, submit activation, saved URL, and evidence disclosure focus are exercised.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Focus restoration after saved session redirect
manual_validation_checklist.detail: QA and code saved redirects wait for focus on the status region.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Visible progress states
manual_validation_checklist.detail: QA and code forms expose text progress stages instead of relying on audio or a static spinner.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Role switching
manual_validation_checklist.detail: Teacher, learner, and admin role transitions are exercised in one browser session.

manual_validation_checklist.title: Admin navigation
manual_validation_checklist.detail: Admin system view reachability and diagnostics section visibility are exercised.

screen_reader_validation_notes.note: No Windows/NVDA environment was available in this run; keep this as a manual release check before a Windows classroom claim.
The current host is macOS, but this smoke does not automate speech output; use VoiceOver rotor checks for landmarks, forms, citations, and saved redirects.
No Android/TalkBack device was available in this run; do not claim Android screen-reader validation from this artifact.

known_accessibility_limits: The smoke gate is not WCAG certification.
The browser and screen-reader matrix may be incomplete.
OCR quality affects document accessibility and source usefulness.
Code editor fields are simple textareas, not full IDE accessibility surfaces.
Speech-output quality still needs manual assistive-technology review.
